body:
> [!NOTE]
> Do not enable Trace Payload protocol V1 until further notice as it is not enabled on all DataDog backends yet.

# Components

## AI Guard

* :sparkles: Add ai_guard.event tag to local root span (#11109 - @manuel-alvarez-alvarez)
* :sparkles: Expose tag probabilities in SDK responses (#11063 - @manuel-alvarez-alvarez)

## Application Security Management (IAST)

* :bug: 🪞 10671 - Fix platform-dependent String.getBytes() calls to use explicit UTF-8 charset (#11149 - @mcculls - thanks @saravadeo for the contribution!)

## Application Security Management (WAF)

* :sparkles: Add `server.request.body.files_content` AppSec address: commons-fileupload (#11137), Tomcat & Netty multipart (#11198), Jersey & RESTEasy(#11229) - @jandro996
* :sparkles:  Add `server.request.body.filenames` AppSec address: Jersey & RESTEasy (#11171), Akka HTTP (#11173), Undertow & Play (#11174) - @jandro996
* :sparkles:  Expose `server.io.fs.file_write` AppSec address for write file operations (#11084),`FileOutputStream`/`FileInputStream` constructors(#11113), `Files.copy` overloads (#11179)  - @jandro996
* :sparkles: Add AppSec Java support for AWS Lambdas (#10570 - @claponcet)
* :bug: Restore original tracer during LambdaAppSecHandlerTest cleanup (#11172 - @claponcet)

## Configuration

* :sparkles: Add Integration Specific Handling for Config Inversion Linter (#11074 - @mhlidd)
* :sparkles: Add Profiling Specific Handling for Config Inversion Linter (#11066 - @mhlidd)
* :sparkles: Update Spock Tests to run with `STRICT_TEST` mode by default (#11032 - @mhlidd)

## Continuous Integration Visibility

* :sparkles: Honor attempt to fix failures (#11244 - @daniel-mohedano)
* :sparkles: Avoid feature discover and java.nio.* access in Bazel Mode (#11232 - @daniel-mohedano)
* :sparkles: Implement Bazel support for CI Visibility (#11150 - @daniel-mohedano)
* :bug: Fix TestNG session status reported with EFD (#11087 - @daniel-mohedano)

## Crash Tracking

* :sparkles: Enable sending crashtracking reports to errors intake by default (#11243 - @amarziali)
* :bug: 🪞 10671 - Fix platform-dependent String.getBytes() calls to use explicit UTF-8 charset (#11149 - @mcculls - thanks @saravadeo for the contribution!)
* :sparkles: Do not use java.nio in crashtracking init (premain) (#11080 - @amarziali)

## Dynamic Instrumentation

* :bug: Fix NullPointerException on samplers (#11230 - @jpbempel)
* :bug: Fix NullPointerException in Exception Replay (#11219 - @jpbempel)
* :sparkles: Add support for case insensitivity file names  (#11205 - @jpbempel)
* :bug: Fix DebuggerAgent commonInit (#11183 - @jpbempel)
* :bug: 🪞 10671 - Fix platform-dependent String.getBytes() calls to use explicit UTF-8 charset (#11149 - @mcculls - thanks @saravadeo for the contribution!)
* :sparkles: Add support for windows-style path (backslashes) (#11073 - @jpbempel)

## Metrics

* :sparkles: Report dropped stats aggregates in health metrics (#11231 - @amarziali)
* :sparkles: Upgrade jmxfetch dependency to 0.52.0 (#11127 - @mcculls)
* :sparkles: Upgrade java-dogstatsd-client dependency to 4.4.5 (#11126 - @mcculls)

## OpenFeature

* :bulb: Add flag evaluation metrics via OTel counter and OpenFeature Hook (#11040 - @typotter)
* :sparkles: Refine variant reason computation to include SPLIT and STATIC (#11037 - @typotter)
* :bug: Strictly check variant types in Flag Evaluations (#11036 - @typotter)

## Profiling

* :sparkles: Bump Java profiler library to [1.42.0](https://github.com/DataDog/java-profiler/releases/tag/v_1.42.0) (#11222 - @jbachorik)
  * (subsumes) Bump Java profiler library to [1.41.0](https://github.com/DataDog/java-profiler/releases/tag/v_1.41.0) (#11169 - @jbachorik)

## Telemetry

* :sparkles: Remove noise at boostrap due to telemetry failures (#11218 - @amarziali)

## Testing

* :broom: Migrate OtlpWriterCombinedTest from groovy to junit (#11245 - @mtoffl01)
* :sparkles: Improve trace assert API (#11209 - @PerfectSlayer)
* :bug::zap: Improve instrumentation JUnit testing  (#11096 - @PerfectSlayer)
* :sparkles: Improve Config JUnit extension (#11094 - @PerfectSlayer)
* :sparkles: Add Config and Context JUnit extensions (#11076 - @PerfectSlayer)
* :sparkles: Update Spock Tests to run with `STRICT_TEST` mode by default (#11032 - @mhlidd)

## Trace context propagation

* :bug::closed_lock_with_key: Add items and bytes limits to baggage extraction (#11265 - @PerfectSlayer)
* :bulb: Add Sofa RPC instrumentation (Bolt, H2C, REST, Triple) (#11135 - @ValentinZakharov)
* :bug: Preload scope classes to prevent virtual thread deadlock (#11111 - @PerfectSlayer)

## Tracer core

* :bug: Fix peer IP tags in Jetty/Dropwizard (#11237 - @smola)
* :sparkles: Use ParentBasedAlwaysOnSampler by default when OTLP traces export is enabled (#11225 - @mtoffl01)
* :sparkles: Introduce a generic JavaModuleOpener for JPMS (#11220 - @amarziali)
* :sparkles: Allow mapping process tags from env or sysprops (#11204 - @amarziali)
* :sparkles: Add OtlpWriter for OTLP traces export   (#11200 - @mtoffl01)
* :bug: Add support double quotes as a single token in SQLNormalizer (#11197 - @Eldolfin)
* :bug: Fix NPE in PayloadDispatcherImpl (#11196 - @amarziali)
* :bug: Widen info state hashing catch (#11192 - @amarziali)
* :sparkles: Add classloader exclusions for drools generated classes (#11191 - @amarziali)
* :bug: 🪞 10671 - Fix platform-dependent String.getBytes() calls to use explicit UTF-8 charset (#11149 - @mcculls - thanks @saravadeo for the contribution!)
* :bug: Abort on IBMJ9's `keytool`  (#11133 - @bric3)
* :sparkles: Upgrade byte-buddy dependency to 1.18.8 (#11128 - @mcculls)
* :sparkles::zap: Cache span.kind as byte ordinal for fast isOutbound() (#11116 - @dougqh)
* :bug: Fix container ID parsing for cgroup v1 in EKS-Fargate (#11110 - @vandonr)
* :sparkles: Optimize PendingTrace span registration and time tracking (#11078 - @bm1549)
* :bug: Fix _dd.p.ksr formatting to use 6 decimal places (#11068 - @bm1549)
* :sparkles: Efficient Trace Payload Protocol  (v1 protocol) (#10801 - @AlexeyKuznetsov-DD)

# Instrumentations

## Apache Spark instrumentation

* :sparkles: Add spark.openlineage.appName tag to spark.application spans (#11246 - @aboitreaud)
* :bug: Fall back to jobGroupId when jobRunId equals taskRunId (#11199 - @aboitreaud)
* :sparkles: Instrument QueryExecution.assertAnalyzed() to catch DataFrame analysis failures (#11033 - @aboitreaud)

## AWS SDK instrumentation

* :bug: Fix SNS v2 batch injection bug (#11190 - @ygree)

## Core Java language instrumentation

* :bug: Preload scope classes to prevent virtual thread deadlock (#11111 - @PerfectSlayer)
* :sparkles: Add a jpms opener for HostNameResolver cache (#11095 - @amarziali)

## Jetty instrumentation

* :bug: Fix peer IP tags in Jetty/Dropwizard (#11237 - @smola)

## Kafka instrumentation

* :sparkles: Add Kafka cluster ID and offset tags to producer/consumer spans (#11107 - @piochelepiotr)

## OpenTelemetry instrumentation

* :bug: Correctly export overflow histogram bucket over OTLP (#11261 - @mcculls)
* :bulb: Support sending OpenTelemetry logs over OTLP (http/protobuf) (#11253 - @mcculls)
* :bug::zap: Miscellaneous OpenTelemetry Metrics fixes (#11240 - @mcculls)
* :bulb: Implement OpenTelemetry Logs API (#11224 - @mcculls)
* :bulb: Add telemetry attributes to OTLP payloads (#11125 - @mcculls)
* :bulb: Provide optimized writers for OpenTelemetry's "trace.proto" wire protocol (#11120 - @mcculls)

## Sofa RPC

* :bulb: Add Sofa RPC instrumentation (Bolt, H2C, REST, Triple) (#11135 - @ValentinZakharov)
